sys_script_client.description: v2.5.13 - Check if parent is closed - prompt user if can't reopen - Check if any subtasks are closed incomplete - prompt user if subtasks are closed incomplete and prompt to determine if user would like to reopen - reopen tasks and subtasks if confirmed
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Reopen Parent is not active - start Tasker - Reopen Parent is not active - end Tasker - Closed too long to reopen 1 Tasker - Closed too long to reopen 2 Tasker - Closed too long to reopen 3 Tasker - Do you want to reopen Subtasks
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit - Reopen
